findings.title: DES encryption in ECB mode for data protection
findings.description: Application uses DES/ECB/PKCS5Padding to encrypt sensitive records; DES has a 56-bit key trivially brute-forced

findings.title: Hardcoded DES encryption key
findings.description: DES encryption key hardcoded as plaintext string in source code

findings.title: MD5 used for password hashing
findings.description: User passwords hashed with unsalted MD5 via MessageDigest which is cryptographically broken

findings.title: MD5 used for data integrity signatures
findings.description: Integrity signatures computed using MD5 concatenation instead of HMAC

findings.title: Predictable session token generation via seeded PRNG
findings.description: Session tokens generated using java.util.Random seeded with predictable timestamp value

findings.title: Predictable API token generation
findings.description: API tokens generated by hashing predictable sequential counter and timestamp values
